notes: Renamed the beta workspace to Pathmark Online beta and moved it closer to the desktop planning model.
Added Google-Sheet-backed management screens for Areas, Goals and Projects, Routines, Calendar Blocks, Task Prompts, Tasklists, and Exports.
Expanded the Pathmark Sync sheet schema beyond pending_changes so online records can live in structured tabs owned by the user.
Added browser downloads for calendar .ics files, Google Tasks CSV, and printable tasklists generated from the user-owned sync sheet.
Kept Supabase limited to roles, status, feature flags, and audit logs; personal planning records remain in the user's Google Sheet or local Workspace.
